ideation: This animation sequence represents a gesture of reverence or prayer towards the Kaaba.  The animation will involve a slow, deliberate lowering of both arms, as if in a bowing motion, followed by a slight raising of the arms, as if in supplication.  The palms will face downward throughout to show respect.  The movement will be symmetrical and controlled, reflecting the solemnity of the gesture.  I'll use the examples to ensure smooth transitions and avoid jerky movements.

frames.beat: arms start at neutral, palms down
arms lower slightly, a gentle bow begins
arms lower further in deep reverence
arms begin to rise slowly, in supplication
arms return to neutral, gesture complete
